title: DynamicCredentialProof
description: Dynamic SDK credential proof. Slice-B's primary credential path: Discord users bind wallets via Dynamic Labs; bot reads dynamic_user_id at session-start; mint orchestrator resolves identity via this proof shape. SIWE/passkey/seedvault are alternate paths (V2 in slice-B scope).

type.description: Discriminant for credential type. Set to 'dynamic' for this proof shape.

dynamic_user_id.description: Dynamic SDK user ID. Used as direct lookup key in midi_profiles.dynamic_user_id (mibera) or profiles.dynamic_user_id (cubquest).

verified_credentials.description: Dynamic-attested credentials (wallets, email, social). Mirrors Dynamic SDK verifiedCredentials structure.
